AL.source_doc: NHC 'Official NHC 5-Year Average Forecast Errors (2020-2024)', OFCL_5-yr_averages.pdf, ATL intensity row; cross-validated byte-identical vs Verification_2025.pdf Table 3

EP.source_doc: NHC 'Official NHC 5-Year Average Forecast Errors (2020-2024)', OFCL_5-yr_averages.pdf, EPAC intensity row; cross-validated vs Verification_2025.pdf Table 7

CP.source_doc: CPHC 5-year running verification (2011-2019 report), '5 year running average - CPHC intensity error in knots', 2015-2019 row; no 60 h column, no bias row published
CP.staleness_note: CPHC's most recent published 5-year verification window (2015-2019) - older than the NHC AL/EP window; NHC annual reports carry no CP intensity verification. Disclosed inline, never silently borrowed from EP.

WP.source_doc: JTWC Annual Tropical Cyclone Report 2020, Table 6-4 (p.104), '5Yr Avg' 2016-2020 row - native 1-min kt, native 12 h AND 36 h columns; the 36 h value 12.9 was verified at 400 dpi after a sourcing transposition to 13.9 was caught by the adversarial pass
WP.vintage_note: The TRACK cone pins jtwc-wpac-mean-2015 (Typhoon Committee); this intensity cone pins ATCR 2020 (native kt incl. 12/36 h). The 2015 report's intensity table is m/s 2-min winds without 12/36 h - incomparable. Different verification vintages, disclosed rather than forced consistent.
